findings.title: Test case IDs are not a contiguous ordered sequence
findings.details: Actual IDs: TC-PDSP-001, TC-PDSP-002, TC-PDSP-003, TC-PDSP-004, TC-PDSP-006, TC-PDSP-007, TC-PDSP-008, TC-PDSP-009, TC-PDSP-011, TC-PDSP-012, TC-PDSP-013, TC-PDSP-014.
findings.recommended_action: Renumber test cases into one contiguous ordered sequence without gaps.
